description:
You are a sustainability specialist preparing an ESG report. Quantify the environmental impact of a proposed 50 kW commercial rooftop PV system using PySAM's Pvwattsv8 module and the weather file path specified in /home/ga/.SAM/weather_file_for_task.txt.

System Parameters:
- DC capacity: 50.0 kW
- Module type: 0 (Standard)
- Array type: 1 (Fixed - Roof Mount)
- Tilt: 20 degrees
- Azimuth: 180 degrees
- System losses: 14.08%
- DC-to-AC ratio: 1.2
- Inverter efficiency: 96%

Calculate the annual energy production (kWh and MWh) and avoided CO2 emissions (metric tons) based on a grid emission factor of 0.3856 MT CO2/MWh. Also calculate equivalencies for passenger cars removed (4.6 MT CO2/year/car) and tree seedlings grown for 10 years (0.060 MT CO2/seedling). Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/co2_avoided_report.json with the following structure:
{
    "system_capacity_kw": 50.0,
    "tilt_deg": 20,
    "azimuth_deg": 180,
    "annual_energy_kwh": <computed>,
    "annual_energy_mwh": <computed>,
    "emission_factor_mt_co2_per_mwh": 0.3856,
    "avoided_co2_mt": <computed>,
    "equivalent_cars_removed": <computed>,
    "equivalent_trees_planted": <computed>,
    "weather_file_used": "<path>"
}
